rule-blocked-customer-no-order.description: Orders cannot be created for blocked customers

rule-credit-limit-check.description: Sales order cannot be confirmed if customer exceeds credit limit

rule-quote-expiry.description: Expired quotes cannot be converted to orders

rule-delivery-cannot-exceed-order-qty.description: Delivered quantity cannot exceed ordered quantity per line

rule-invoice-requires-delivery.description: When configured, invoicing requires at least one confirmed delivery
